script: \r import {onMount} from 'svelte';\r \r export let soins = [];\r let showArray = {}, showTextArray = {};\r //onMount( () => {\r for ( let i = 11; i <= 18; i++) {\r showArray[i] = false; showTextArray[i] = []; // 11 -> 18\r showArray[i+10] = false; showTextArray[i+10] = [];// 21 -> 28\r showArray[i+20] = false; showTextArray[i+20] = [];// 31 -> 38\r showArray[i+30] = false; showTextArray[i+30] = [];// 41 -> 48\r showArray[i+40] = false; showTextArray[i+40] = [];// 51 -> 58\r showArray[i+50] = false; showTextArray[i+50] = [];// 61 -> 68\r showArray[i+60] = false; showTextArray[i+60] = [];// 71 -> 78\r showArray[i+70] = false; showTextArray[i+70] = [];// 81 -> 88\r }\r //})\r \r $: {\r for(let soin of soins)\r {\r //TODO - CHANGE THIS TO BE MORE TYPE STRICT, IT IS BAADD\r let teeth = soin.dent.split(" ");\r for(let t of teeth){\r if (parseInt(t) > 10){\r showArray[t] = true;\r let foundcode = false;\r for(let z = 0; z < showTextArray[t].length; z++) \r if (showTextArray[t][z] == soin.code)\r foundcode = true;\r if (! foundcode)\r showTextArray[t] = [...showTextArray[t], soin.code];\r }\r }\r }\r }\r <\/script>\r \r \r \r \r \r \r \r {#each soins as soin, idx}\r \r {soin.dent}\r {soin.code}\r {soin.date}\r {soin.lettre} {soin.cotation}\r {soin.lettre} = {soin.valeur}\r {soin.montant}\r \r {/each}\r \r \r \r \r \r 21 : {showTextArray[21].join(" ")}\r \r \r \r \r 22 : {showTextArray[22].join(" ")}\r \r \r \r \r 23 : {showTextArray[23].join(" ")}\r \r \r \r \r 24 : {showTextArray[24].join(" ")}\r \r \r \r \r 25 : {showTextArray[25].join("
